title: GAME Detective Eva booklet scans
wikitext:
[]: [GAME] Detective Eva booklet scans             Quote Post by Riotgear » Sat Mar 28, 2009 12:56 pm I have the 'Premium Box' edition of Meitantei (Detective) Evangelion, which came with a 30-page booklet containing design sketches related to the game, which I thought I'd share. Before anyone asks, I'm sorry - I can't read anything more complex than hiragana so I can't translate much for you*. Cover | Contents Characters: 01 | 02 | 03 | 04 Entities: 01 | 02 | 03 Bowling: 01 | 02 Eva murder scene Evangelion Otsu Gata: 01 | 02 Artwork development Credits | back cover As you can tell, the game is of course an alternate universe deal, and doesn't take itself seriously. *You're probably wondering why I bought the game in the first place, then. Besides being a sucker for Limited Edition stuff (...sigh... -_-) I hope to enjoy it someday after I have learned Japanese to a sufficient degree. I hope to attend lessons later this year.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Mar 28, 2009 1:11 pm Cool stuff, I'd be interested in seeing more from this game. I know about it, but haven't had much desire to play it. It does sound interesting though.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Mar 28, 2009 1:14 pm Eva bowling looks good for a few lulz. first angel looks rather interesting... like liliel banged one of the rattlehead guys from princess mononoke. Second one, ugh, I hate the angels with the weird 'eyeball' look.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Mar 28, 2009 1:39 pm I'd be interested in some of the character art! Thank you sir, for your generosity.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 28, 2009 7:28 pm No art of Evangelion Beta? Bawwwww. Longinus variants sound interesting. Any text on the Detective-exclusive elements would also be nice to have (for my own nefarious purposes, namely as information references for the Wiki; I'd require 300dpi or higher, but other than that scans of nothing but text can look crappy and it's all good). I guess I'm assuming you have the regular game booklet and not just the special artwork thing. Ultimately, I'll take whatever you're willing to scan in. ;D

[]:             Quote Post by Riotgear » Mon Mar 30, 2009 1:52 pm Well, I had some spare time and the energy/motivation so I just scanned the whole booklet and it's available in the top post. I want to know what the heck is up with the thing on page 16 - looks like an Eva in a full-body wetsuit or superhero costume. I can't read its name, something- Man . Heh, in the characters section we have a Kyoko and a Hideaki. Reichu wrote: No art of Evangelion Beta? Bawwwww.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Mon Mar 30, 2009 2:10 pm Page 16-17 is a complete blur of colors, looks like it needs to be rescanned. Otherwise, interesting pictures, especially the bowling ones and of the "Otsu Gata." Looks like it has two detachable wings that can make it fly, unless I'm wrong. Those high heels are a bit scary too.

[]:             Quote Post by Destinii Haruya » Mon Mar 30, 2009 2:11 pm This is sweet. Got any more? Any screencaps or anything like that?

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Mon Mar 30, 2009 2:21 pm It seems more logical to have Asuka tossing Shinji around.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 30, 2009 8:10 pm Riotgear wrote: I can't read its name, something- Man .

[]:             Quote Post by Riotgear » Mon Mar 30, 2009 8:50 pm Ironfoot wrote: Page 16-17 is a complete blur of colors, looks like it needs to be rescanned.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Tue Mar 31, 2009 3:02 am Riotgear wrote: How bizarre, it looks fine to me (in both the original scans on my computer and the version at the link where I uploaded it). Any else having this problem? If you empty your cache and redownload it and it's still the same I'll re-upload it - let me know.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Tue Mar 31, 2009 5:18 am Thanks for posting these images. I'd shamelessly be interested in some screencaps if you have them. (Ka-ka-kaworu)

[]:             Quote Post by Riotgear » Sun Apr 05, 2009 10:18 am Ugh, info and images related to this game have become harder to find, so unfortunately I can't link you to to anywhere bar the official page for the game (where the promo video sadly no longer works). Sorry, I think this is as much as I can provide for now. Whenever I finally get around to chipping my PS2 I'll probably be able to share more. Found this on Heiseidemocracy: In this game, you play Shinji Ikari, bold Special NERV Investigator (I suppose if your Dad is Gendo you can do whatever you want), who is investigating the mysterious mystery of a murder, committed mysteriously under mysterious circumstances. Yes, I’m trying to get you excited - the concept sure is dull. You’ll compete against your rival Kaworu Nagisa to unlock the mystery surrounding the new Evangelion. There’s mini games within the game too - Action Games, Sound Games and -check this out- Bowling Games. The game will also feature the original cast in full voice.

[]:             Quote Post by pikadourei » Sun Apr 12, 2009 4:06 pm sure sounds mysteriously mysterious to me

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Apr 12, 2009 4:22 pm So could Dr. K's first name possibly be Man?????
